meaning: adj.(已持续)长时间的,为时甚久的adv.长久
examples: He's stunned by today's resignation of his longtime ally.
Sun Microsystems gave up its legal fight with Microsoft and agreed to cooperate with its longtime nemesis.
The gathering was organized by Warren Buckleitner, a longtime reviewer of interactive children's media.
He's one of the campaign's organizers and a longtime anti-abortion activist in the state.
Bahrain has been a longtime ally of the United States of America and a longtime partner.
